description: Side-by-side system vs. keyword-only baseline comparison across all evaluated papers.
baseline_description: Keyword-only gap framing: raw gap statement submitted to the LLM without critic scoring, debate, or reflection refinement.

overall.interpretation: System hypotheses outperform keyword-only baselines by an average of +1.39 points (24.4%) across all 32 gaps and 96 pairwise comparisons.

per_paper.notes: System excels on data_quality and scalability gaps where the critic rubric strongly favours concrete, testable hypotheses.
Narrowest margin — paper_2 gaps may require domain knowledge beyond the current LLM context window.
Highest win rate; high agent_agreement_rate (0.88) suggests consistent gap framing led to more reliable hypotheses.

rag_ablation.reason: RAG usage flag not captured in current evaluation schema. Planned for v1.1.
